name: Order Management System uses protected routes with role-based access control
description: Main Admin has full system control including creating admins, approving logins, and managing all orders and users. Sub Admin has limited access, can only manage assigned orders, and requires admin approval for access

name: Startup Idea Sharing Platform
description: IdeaVault is a modern web platform where users can share, explore, and discuss innovative startup ideas. It enables collaboration and idea validation through community feedback.

name: BookNest - Online Book Borrowing Platform
description: A modern, responsive online book borrowing system built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, MongoDB, and BetterAuth. Users can browse, search, and borrow books with secure authentication.

name: Dragon News - News Web Application
description: A modern news web application built with Next.js. It displays latest news/articles in a responsive layout with dynamic routing and clean UI design.

name: Book Vibe - Book Library App
description: A modern React-based book library application with routing, dynamic book details, and chart visualization of reading progress.

name: BPL Player Selection App
description: A React-based interactive player selection app with coin management system, where users can select players using virtual coins and get real-time updates with toast notifications.

name: GitHub Issue Tracker App
description: A web application that allows users to view, filter, and search GitHub-style issues using an external API. It includes dynamic issue cards, filtering system, search functionality, and detailed modal views.

name: AI Project - Car Models App
description: A modern React-based car models application where users can browse car models, add them to a selected list, and switch between dynamic tabs with real-time state updates.
